# Copilot Instructions

## 项目指南
- User prefers the evolution workflow to be split into separate planning, execution, and acceptance stages: one task generates implementation plans for detected skill gaps, another executes plan steps, and a final task performs acceptance and forms the resulting Skill.
- User prefers OwnerAI to evolve toward an observable, stateful agent host with a hardened task state machine, structured tool results, explicit model routing/fallback, effective memory injection, and a strict evolution lifecycle with recovery and acceptance.

## Model Availability
- User has local Ollama models available: GLM-4.6v-Flash-9B, deepseek-r1:8B, and deepseek-r1:14B.
